examples.eng: Are the clothes dry yet?
My clothes smelt of smoke.
Clothes make the man.
examples.ru: Одежда красит человека. / Встречают по одёжке, провожают по уму.

examples.eng: These clothes don't fit him.
examples.ru: Этот комплект на нём не сидит.

examples.eng: Put on your warmest clothes — it's freezing outside.
examples.ru: Надевай самую теплую одежду: на улице мороз.

examples.eng: Soak the clothes in cold water.
Clothes littered the floor.
I enjoy shopping for new clothes.
The paint splattered my clothes.
Their clothes argue poverty.
His clothes were old and torn.
examples.ru: Его одежда была старой и рваной.

examples.eng: The clothes were a perfect fit.
We had to wash our clothes by hand.
All she's interested in is clothes.
examples.ru: Все, что ей интересно - это одежда.

examples.eng: What kind of clothes should you wear?
They find him in clothes.
He climbed into his clothes.
She wears the nicest clothes.
His clothes looked brand-new.
examples.ru: Одежда на нём была как новая.

examples.eng: Her clothes were in sad shape.
examples.ru: Её одежда была в плачевном состоянии.

examples.eng: She's very choosy about clothes.
examples.ru: Она очень разборчива в плане одежды.

examples.eng: Her clothes are so old-fashioned!
The cold wind pierced our clothes.
with clothes wet by splashed water
A woman came to unpeg the clothes.
examples.ru: Пришла женщина снять бельё с верёвки.

examples.eng: My clothes were absolutely sopping!
He spent a wad on clothes.
examples.ru: Он потратил кучу денег на одежду.

examples.eng: I have outgrown these clothes.
examples.ru: Я уже вырос из этой одежды.

examples.eng: How are you off for clothes?

examples.ru: Шутки ради они спрятали его одежду.
